name: Student Package — 4D3N Ijen + Bromo + Madakaripura + Night Market
description: ISIC student rate for 4-day private tour: Ijen Blue Fire, Bromo sunrise, Madakaripura waterfall canyon descent, and local night market. Same safety standards: HPWKI-registered guides, mandatory health screening (BBKSDA SE.1658/KSA.9/2024). ISIC Provider ID 259268. Licensed operator NIB 1102230032918.
touristType: International students with verified ISIC card

item.name: Day 1 — Surabaya to Bondowoso
item.description: Private transfer from Surabaya to Bondowoso. Health screening on arrival (BBKSDA SE.1658/KSA.9/2024). Dinner and overnight.

item.name: Day 2 — Ijen Blue Fire Crater
item.description: Midnight departure to Paltuding base. Guided ascent to Kawah Ijen crater rim (2,386 m). Blue Fire observation. Gas masks and trekking poles provided. Descent, breakfast, transfer west to Bromo area.

item.name: Day 3 — Bromo Sunrise + Madakaripura Waterfall
item.description: Penanjakan viewpoint for Bromo sunrise. Private 4WD jeep to crater base. Madakaripura Waterfall canyon descent. Evening: local night market visit.

item.name: Day 4 — Return to Surabaya
item.description: Breakfast. Private transfer to Surabaya for drop-off at airport or hotel.

offers.description: ISIC student pricing per person: IDR 6,500,000 (solo) · IDR 3,700,000 (2 pax) · IDR 3,500,000 (3) · IDR 3,300,000 (4–5) · IDR 3,100,000 (6–7) · IDR 2,900,000 (8–10) · IDR 2,700,000 (11+). All-inclusive: private transport, 3 nights accommodation + breakfast, entrance fees, Bromo jeep, Ijen gas masks, health screening, night market visit, water, T-shirt.
